title: Bazingacraft
description: Replaces the creeper hiss sound effect with Sheldon Cooper saying "Bazinga"
body:
This resource pack replaces the creeper hissing sound with Sheldon Cooper from _The Big Bang Theory_ saying "Bazinga."

I couldn't figure out how to get sounds.json to work properly, so it also technically replaces the TNT hiss with a pitched-up bazinga.

Enjoy! (Works for probably most versions)
